risks.why: Final strict matrix passed including build, full-system strict, deterministic harness, and maintenance.
risks.recommendedNextAction: Keep strict matrix in CI and fail on regression.

risks.why: Truth-firewall controls are explicit and passing, but safety still depends on continued write-boundary adoption discipline.
risks.recommendedNextAction: Continue enforcing boundary assertions on newly introduced write paths.

risks.why: Registry governance and drift checks are passing, but selected nested payload zones remain intentionally loose.
risks.recommendedNextAction: Progressively tighten high-risk loose schema sections with focused tests.

risks.why: Degraded policy and cockpit command verification now explicitly cover non-debit degraded outcomes and pass.
risks.recommendedNextAction: Keep degraded/debit invariant tests mandatory in strict matrix.

risks.why: Fallback classification is clearer after chunk 7, but policy remains intentionally narrow and heuristic in parts.
risks.recommendedNextAction: Monitor production signals and refine fallback taxonomy incrementally.

risks.why: Chunk 8 improved traceability, but cockpit orchestration still carries dense cross-policy ownership.
risks.recommendedNextAction: Plan small, safe ownership splits only when new complexity is added.

risks.why: Critical surfaces now have dedicated verify commands and strict umbrella inclusion; final matrix is fully green.
risks.recommendedNextAction: Require updates to strict umbrella whenever new critical surfaces are introduced.
